# SystemdUnit

Write a systemd unit file and optionally manage the service.

## Summary

- kind: `SystemdUnit`
- visibility: `public`
- schema: `../../../schemas/tools/systemd-unit.schema.json`
- category: `system`

## When To Use

Use this when workflows need to install or override a custom unit definition.

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-systemdunit
kind: SystemdUnit
spec:
    content: example
    path: example
```

## Realistic Example

```yaml
kind: SystemdUnit
spec:
  path: /etc/systemd/system/kubelet.service
  contentFromTemplate: kubelet.service.tmpl
  daemonReload: true
  service:
    name: kubelet
    enabled: true
    state: started
```
